heading: Atlas Go SDK
body:
> **Note:** The Atlas Go SDK (Software Development Kit) replaces the previous Go HTTP client ([go-client-mongodb-atlas](https://github.com/mongodb/go-client-mongodb-atlas/tree/master))
> for the Atlas Administration API. To migrate from
> `go-client-mongodb-atlas` to the Atlas Go SDK (Software Development Kit), see the
> [Migrate from the Go HTTP Client to the Atlas Go SDK](atlas-sdk-migration).

You can access the Atlas Go SDK (Software Development Kit) here:

- [Access the Atlas Go SDK](https://github.com/mongodb/atlas-sdk-go/)

- [View the Atlas Go SDK package in pkg.go.dev](https://pkg.go.dev/go.mongodb.org/atlas-sdk)

To learn about the Atlas Go SDK (Software Development Kit), use the following resources. This
documentation reflects the latest version of the Atlas Go SDK (Software Development Kit):

- [Authenticating with the Atlas Go SDK](atlas-sdk-authentication)

- [Learn Concepts for the Atlas Go SDK](atlas-sdk-concepts)

- [Error Handling](atlas-sdk-error_handling)

- [Migrate from the Go HTTP Client to the Atlas Go SDK](atlas-sdk-migration)

- [Best Practices](atlas-sdk-best_practices)

- [SDK Reference](https://github.com/mongodb/atlas-sdk-go/blob/main/docs/doc_last_reference.md)
